metadata.author: hturbano
metadata.description: Reusable time intelligence DAX patterns for Power BI reports.

YTD.name: Year-to-Date
YTD.description: Running total from the beginning of the year to the current date.

MTD.name: Month-to-Date
MTD.description: Running total from the beginning of the month to the current date.

QTD.name: Quarter-to-Date
QTD.description: Running total from the beginning of the quarter to the current date.

YoY.name: Year-over-Year Value
YoY.description: The value of the measure for the same period in the prior year.

YoY_Change.name: Year-over-Year Change
YoY_Change.description: Percentage change compared to the same period last year.

YoY_Absolute.name: Year-over-Year Absolute Change
YoY_Absolute.description: Absolute difference compared to the same period last year.

MoM.name: Month-over-Month Value
MoM.description: The value of the measure for the previous month.

MoM_Change.name: Month-over-Month Change
MoM_Change.description: Percentage change compared to the previous month.

Rolling_7_Day.name: 7-Day Rolling Average
Rolling_7_Day.description: Average of the measure over the last 7 days.

Rolling_30_Day.name: 30-Day Rolling Average
Rolling_30_Day.description: Average of the measure over the last 30 days.

Running_Total.name: Running Total
Running_Total.description: Cumulative running total from the earliest date to the current date.

Prior_Year_YTD.name: Prior Year YTD
Prior_Year_YTD.description: Year-to-date value from the prior year for comparison.
